name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl watering water in a garden. The main character was girl, girl is watering in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
/u00b0d /i\ A boy says to the other boys who are playing tag with her that he thinks she looks like an angel and asks him if it means anything because his name is Adam (God) or Jesus (Son). They both look at eachother but they ignore all others around them as usual. He tries to go for more matches by telling this silly tale about how "the angels sing," which causes everyone else to think these were only friends talking together then when someone gets hurt some people start screaming on camera saying we need help! She leaves so nobody has heard what happened outside now even though most seem interested; also apparently no one would know any better than us since our parents had never seen their little girls grow up before!! At school another kid from class walks over asking why does your sister do stuff while you're alone? But here comes my favorite line outta everything I've ever read either way.."So tell me!" said Kuzuro again putting herself
